chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 231 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 472/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025. Mr. Abid Hussain Chang, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Khoso, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant A.G, Sindh. = Counsel for the applicant files a statement alongwith certain documents and the case law which are taken on record. For reasons to be recorded, the Revision Application is dismissed alongwith listed application. The trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within a period of six months from the date of receipt of this order. JUDGE Tufail
